```bash

import re

with open('./llvm/lib/Analysis/ScalarEvolution.cpp', 'r') as f:
    content = f.read()

# Find the SCEVMapper struct
struct_start = content.find('  struct SCEVMapper : public SCEVRewriteVisitor<SCEVMapper> {')
if struct_start == -1:
    print("Could not find SCEVMapper struct")
    exit(1)

# Find the end of the struct
struct_end = content.find('  };', struct_start)
if struct_end == -1:
    print("Could not find end of SCEVMapper struct")
    exit(1)

struct_end += 4  # Include the "  };"

struct_content = content[struct_start:struct_end]

# Add visitSMaxExpr method before the closing brace
new_method = '''    const SCEV *visitSMaxExpr(const SCEVSMaxExpr *Expr) {
      SmallVector<const SCEV *, 2> Operands;
      bool Changed = false;
      for (const auto *Op : Expr->operands()) {
        Operands.push_back(visit(Op));
        Changed |= Op != Operands.back();
      }
      if (!Changed)
        return Expr;
      for (const SCEV *Op : Operands) {
        if (isa<SCEVCouldNotCompute>(Op))
          return SE.getCouldNotCompute();
      }
      return SE.getSMaxExpr(Operands);
    }

'''

# Insert before the closing brace
struct_content = struct_content[:-4] + new_method + '  };'

# Replace the struct in the content
new_content = content[:struct_start] + struct_content + content[struct_end:]

with open('./llvm/lib/Analysis/ScalarEvolution.cpp', 'w') as f:
    f.write(new_content)

print("Added visitSMaxExpr to SCEVMapper")
EOF
```
